subcodes.first_line: The purpose of creation is the manifestation of this Most Exalted, Most Holy Day, which in the divine Books, Scrolls and Tablets is known as the Day of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: مقصود از آفرینش ظهور این یوم امنع اقدس که در کتب و صحف و زبر الهی بیوم الله
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @spiritual transformation, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the Imamate; the Caliphate, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of
